title: オークスの後に・受け継がれし冠

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And Air Groove is in the lead! She's done it!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove has made history on the turf today as
she continues her mother's legacy! We have a new
queen today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I... really won?

text_block_list.name: Female Fan
text_block_list.text:
You were amazing, Air Groove! Three cheers for
the new queen!

text_block_list.name: Male Fan
text_block_list.text:
Hip hip hooray! Congrats on following your
mother's legacy!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's real... I'm the new Queen of the Oaks. Which
means...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Just... wow...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I wish I could be like her... So proud and majestic.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go to greet Air Groove after her incredible
victory.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Yes... I've finally made it.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
...I have to admit that even I cannot contain my
emotions right now.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Today, I was able to see the same view my mother
did.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...You've done well yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You are aware that this is not the end, correct? In
fact, this is only the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Next is the Shuka Sho. We need to stay focused
and keep our eyes on the prize.
choice_data_list: You're sounding like a queen already.
You're sounding like a queen already.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh... you're not sounding too bad yourself.
When did you get so reliable?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Keep that up from here on out, and there may be
hope for you yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Groove graces me with a regal smile.
